heading: Department of the Army: seal
label: 7012 Department of the Army: seal
text: The Secretary of the Army shall have a seal for the Department of the Army. The design of the seal must be approved by the President. Judicial notice shall be taken of the seal.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30115:181–1(d)., .July 26, 1947, ch. 343, § 205(d)61 Stat. 501The words “of office” are omitted as surplusage.
